Event: The Aboriginal Adventure
Event Date: 13/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: CB45
Anacoda Bite Crossbow

When attacking, has a 36% chance of dealing 185% damage in 2 seconds.
Once in a while, the unit reduces all stats of all enemy units by 30% for 4 sec., and deals 500000 pure damage to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. Each of the affected units also has a 40% chance to be petrified for 4 sec. For this duration, the target cannot move, and receives 40% more damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
